data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of an audit trail showing the behavior of an AI agent versus a human actor. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete details or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. As such, there is no basis to assess whether the scenario behavior is supported or if a failure report was generated, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of simulation results or audit trail validation.
